title: mentha crispata var. lacerata
intro: Mentha crispata var. lacerata, also known as variegated mint or cut-leaved mint, is a type of mint plant that is characterized by its distinctive cut or lacerated leaves and its variegated foliage. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a digestive aid and a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha crispata var. lacerata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through methods such as steaming, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves typically being used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
